issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' or event-based, not 'Activated'. This is a passive effect triggered when a DON!! card on field is returned to deck.
Missing duration field. Text contains '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not Permanent or EndOfTurn.
Condition type should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The condition checks if Leader has {Kid Pirates} type, not if a card is on board.

Actions are incomplete. GiveDon should attach a DON!! from deck (requires SearchDeck behavior), and Rest should target the attached DON, not Self. The card being returned to deck must be monitored as a trigger condition.
[Once Per Turn] restriction is not encoded in DSL. This should be captured in frequency limits or trigger constraints.
